title: Tangy Crispy Uruguayan Dates Crumble
description: A comforting Uruguayan dish featuring stoned dates mixed with tangy flavors and topped with a crispy crumble for an irresistible snack or dessert.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix the dates with condensed milk and ground flaxseed. Stir in olive oil, vanilla extract, cinnamon powder, and grated lime zest.
Transfer half of the mixture onto an ungreased baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Spread it out into a thin layer to form a base for the crumble.
For the topping: In another bowl, combine almond flour with remaining 1/4 cup of condensed milk. Stir until smooth and pour over the date mixture on the pan.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy. Let cool slightly before serving.
